name: Perfection Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and chop the pimientos from the jar.
2. Mix gelatin with lemon juice, water, sugar, cider vinegar, and salt until dissolved.
3. Stir in shredded cabbage, chopped green pepper, and chopped pimientos.
4. Let mixture set at room temperature until firm.
5. Gently fold in the chilled prepared salad components to serve.
